name: Comet Card
summary: A dynamic card component featuring a comet-like trailing effect on hover, with glowing animations and motion that creates a sense of speed and energy for engaging content presentation.
detailedDescription: The Comet Card component creates an exciting, energetic hover effect inspired by comets streaking through space - when users interact with the card, a glowing trail follows the cursor or animates across the surface, creating a sense of motion and speed. This distinctive effect combines gradient animations, blur filters, and strategic opacity transitions to simulate the luminous tail of a comet. The card typically features a dark background that makes the glowing effect pop, with bright colors (often blues, purples, or cyans) creating the comet trail. The animation can be triggered by hover, cursor movement across the card, or run as a continuous subtle effect. Visual elements include the glowing trail, subtle particle effects, and smooth transitions that make the card feel alive and responsive. Perfect for gaming interfaces, tech product showcases, creative portfolios, or any context where conveying energy, speed, and dynamism enhances the message. The effect creates memorable micro-interactions that users notice and appreciate, adding polish and personality to card-based layouts.
purpose: Create energetic, comet-inspired hover effects with glowing trails
Convey speed, motion, and dynamism through visual animation
Generate memorable micro-interactions that delight users
Add distinctive personality to card-based interfaces
Support gaming, tech, or creative contexts with energetic aesthetics
behavior: Generates glowing comet trail effect on hover or cursor movement
Animates gradient and blur filters creating luminous tail appearance
Tracks cursor position for interactive trail following
Applies smooth opacity transitions for natural fade effects
Uses GPU-accelerated animations for smooth performance
Features dark backgrounds maximizing glow visibility
Returns smoothly to rest state when interaction ends
visualCharacteristics: Glowing comet trail creating sense of motion and speed
Energetic, dynamic appearance with luminous effects
Dark backgrounds with bright, vibrant accent colors
Smooth, fluid animations feeling responsive and alive
Distinctive, memorable aesthetic standing out from standard cards
recommendations: Pairs well with testimonials, feature grids, and product highlight sections.
